headline: GigaCloud Technology Stock Gets A Composite Rating Upgrade
summary: GigaCloud Technology saw its IBD SmartSelect Composite Rating jump to 96 Wednesday, up from 94 the day before.

headline: Qualcomm Declines 25.5% in Past 3 Months: Should Investors Worry?
summary: QCOM stock sinks 25.5% in three months as margin pressure, China risks and weak handset demand cloud near-term growth outlook.

headline: Oracle layoffs will help cost savings, analysts say
summary: Oracle plans to cut thousands of jobs which will free up cash flow as the company aggressively invests in its AI data center buildout.

headline: Iran threatens Nvidia, Apple and other tech giants with attacks
summary: Iran's Revolutionary Guard has warned a number of tech companies with Middle East operations that they'll be considered "legitimate targets."

headline: Assessing Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) Valuation After Recent Share Price Strength
summary: Why Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) Is Back On Investors’ Radar Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) has drawn fresh attention after recent share price moves, with the stock up about 11% over the past month and slightly negative over the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Hewlett Packard Enterprise.
